recommendations.title: The Worst Days
recommendations.overview: Four episodes – Christmas, May 1st (Labour Day), August 15th (Ferragosto), Halloween – to tell four stories that delve into the human soul.

recommendations.title: The Best Days
recommendations.overview: A quartet of stories unfold across four holidays as family members, friends and colleagues face hard decisions, career setbacks and life-changing events.

recommendations.title: More the Merrier
recommendations.overview: Multiple stories about the oscillating world of couple relationships and how difficult it can be to separate sex from love.

recommendations.title: Out of the Blue

recommendations.title: Hands of Stone
recommendations.overview: The legendary Roberto Duran and his equally legendary trainer Ray Arcel change each other's lives.

recommendations.title: Tuttapposto
recommendations.overview: Roberto is a student in a corrupt university where teachers sell exams and only hire friends and relatives.

recommendations.title: A Fish in Love
recommendations.overview: Carpenter Arturo becomes a literary sensation when the children's stories he writes in his spare time get published, but he comes to resent success and the spotlight that comes with it. During a press tour he falls in love with beautiful married woma

recommendations.title: Mia
recommendations.overview: The story of a small, simple and happy family in which a boy, a manipulator, violently enters, which distorts the life of this wonderful fifteen-year-old and makes her a nightmare.

recommendations.title: The Legendary Giulia and Other Miracles

recommendations.title: Wristcutters: A Love Story
